project_metadata.name: zhengbi-yong.github.io
project_metadata.description: Full-stack personal blog platform with modern frontend and Rust backend

technology_analysis.description: Full-stack blog platform featuring Next.js 15 frontend with React 19, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, backed by Rust/Axum API with PostgreSQL and Redis. Implements JWT authentication, MDX content rendering, magazine-style layouts, admin panel, and comprehensive testing infrastructure.

languages.name: TypeScript
languages.usage: Frontend application logic, React components, API routes

languages.name: Rust
languages.usage: Backend API, database models, business logic

frameworks.name: Next.js
frameworks.purpose: React framework with App Router for frontend application

frameworks.name: Axum
frameworks.purpose: Async web framework for Rust API

frameworks.name: Payload CMS
frameworks.purpose: Headless CMS integration for content management

frameworks.name: TanStack Query
frameworks.purpose: Server state management and data fetching

build_tools.name: pnpm
build_tools.purpose: Fast, disk space efficient package manager for frontend

build_tools.name: Cargo
build_tools.purpose: Rust package manager and build system

build_tools.name: Vite
build_tools.purpose: Fast build tool for Storybook and utilities

test_frameworks.name: Vitest
test_frameworks.usage: Unit and integration testing for frontend

test_frameworks.name: Cargo Test
test_frameworks.usage: Unit and integration testing for Rust backend

architecture.description: Three-tier architecture with clear separation between presentation (Next.js frontend), business logic (Rust services), and data access (PostgreSQL + Redis). Frontend follows component-based architecture with routing, state management, and API integration layers.

patterns.name: Repository Pattern
patterns.description: Database operations abstracted through repository structs

patterns.name: Service Layer Pattern
patterns.description: Business logic encapsulated in service modules (auth, email)

patterns.name: Factory Pattern
patterns.description: Test data factories for deterministic test generation

patterns.name: Component Composition
patterns.description: Reusable React components with composition patterns

patterns.name: Custom Hooks Pattern
patterns.description: Reusable stateful logic through React hooks

patterns.name: BFF Pattern (Backend for Frontend)
patterns.description: API routes that aggregate and transform backend data for frontend

key_components.name: Frontend App Router
key_components.description: Next.js 15 App Router with file-based routing, route groups, and API routes

key_components.name: Rust API Server
key_components.description: Axum-based HTTP server with RESTful endpoints, middleware, and OpenAPI documentation

key_components.name: Authentication System
key_components.description: JWT-based authentication with refresh tokens, password hashing (Argon2), and React auth components

key_components.name: Database Layer
key_components.description: SQLx-based database models with compile-time checked queries, migrations, and connection pooling

key_components.name: MDX Content System
key_components.description: Remote MDX rendering with KaTeX math, syntax highlighting, and custom components

key_components.name: Admin Panel
key_components.description: Comprehensive admin interface for content management, analytics, monitoring, and user management

key_components.name: Magazine Layout System
key_components.description: Masonry grid layout with filtering, recommendations, and hero sections

key_components.name: State Management
key_components.description: Zustand stores for auth, UI, posts, and user preferences

key_components.name: Testing Infrastructure
key_components.description: Comprehensive testing with Vitest, Playwright, and Cargo test with test helpers and fixtures

key_components.name: Shared Utilities
key_components.description: Common error types, API responses, configuration, validation, and middleware

completed_features: MDX blog content rendering with math and syntax highlighting

analysis_sources: bash-discovered: Project structure and file counts via get_modules_by_depth
bash-discovered: package.json and Cargo.toml dependency analysis
gemini-failed: Semantic analysis (better-sqlite3 binding error, proceeding with structural analysis only)
notes: Gemini CLI semantic analysis failed due to better-sqlite3 native binding error
Analysis completed using bash structural scan and configuration file parsing
Architecture patterns identified from code structure and CLAUDE.md documentation
Backend crate structure: api, core, db, shared, worker
Frontend structure: 354 TypeScript files in organized module hierarchy
